title: The Deepest Emission Roots

features.name: the-broadcasting-root
features.desc-on-touch: you grip a massive root, warm from its own transmission, broadcasting a signal deeper into the earth that nothing has answered in fifty years

features.name: the-antenna-grove
features.desc-on-touch: small roots stand upright like a forest of microscopic transmitters; each one has learned the language of frequencies deeper than sound

features.name: the-signal-convergence
features.desc-on-touch: you find where multiple roots meet in an arch of transmission; their signals interfere with each other, creating something neither root sent alone

features.name: the-deep-listening
features.desc-on-touch: you press your ear against the earth and hear roots singing frequencies back to themselves; they are the archive learning its own sound

features.name: the-emission-memory
features.desc-on-touch: you find a root scarred with old transmission damage; it still glows faintly, remembering a broadcast from decades ago that it made and never heard received

inscription: at the deepest emission roots the forest has learned to speak in frequencies that the sky will never hear; the archive listens to itself learning language

file.name: Root_Transmission_Log_1987_Present_Unresolved.txt
file.note: a record of radio signals sent down into the earth by tree roots, with no indication of what might be receiving them; the log keeps growing by itself

exits.label: back up to the storm-archive, where weather is learning to remember
deeper still, where the roots reach bedrock and begin to sing in stone
east where other roots are learning the same frequencies and beginning to harmonize
